title: NewReport
description: Request body for creating a new expense report

name.description: The name or title of the expense report

businessPurpose.description: The business justification for the expenses

startDate.description: The start date of the reporting period

endDate.description: The end date of the reporting period

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code for the report

policyId.description: The identifier of the expense policy to apply

customData.description: Custom field values for the report header
